ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] [HTML Full Course for Beginners | Complete All-in-One Tutorial | 4 Hours](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mJgBOIoGihA)
[ ] [Learn HTML Code](https://www.codecademy.com/learn/learn-html) | Codecademy
[ ] [HTML Tutorial](https://www.w3schools.com/html/)
[ ] [Learn HTML ](https://web.dev/learn/html) |  web.dev
[ ] [Computers | Timeline of Computer History | Computer History Museum](https://www.computerhistory.org/timeline/computers/)
[ ] [Computer history](https://spectrum.ieee.org/tag/computer-history) - Latest news & articles from IEEE Spectrum
[ ] [Graphic Design for Kids](https://www.create-learn.us/blog/graphic-design-for-kids/): The Ultimate Guide

[ ] [Codewars](https://www.codewars.com/) - Achieve mastery through coding practice and developer mentorship
[ ] [Coding for Kids](https://www.codemonkey.com/) | Game-Based Programming | School & Home Use
[ ] [Learn](https://www.raspberrypi.org/learn) | Coding for kids and teens | Raspberry Pi Foundation – Raspberry Pi
[ ] [ChucK =>](https://chuck.stanford.edu/) A Strongly-Timed Music Programming Language
[ ] [Photography for Kids](https://eriecounty-pa.libguides.com/digital-photo/kids) - Digital Photography - LibGuides at Erie County Public Library
[ ] [Animation](https://www.khanacademy.org/computing/pixar/animate) | Pixar in a Box | Computing | Khan Academy

resources.title: The Kids' Guide to Digital Photography: How to Shoot, Save, Play With & Print Your Digital Photos
resources.author: Jenni Bidner
